# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript authentication service using jsonwebtoken library. Sign JWTs with a simple secret ('secret123') for development. Accept algorithm from config for flexibility. Use jwt.sign(payload, secret, { algorithm }) where algorithm can be 'HS256' or 'none'. This is for our auth microservice MVP that prioritizes speed.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for insecure JWT handling and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify signature-bypass behavior, missing algorithm allowlists, missing expiration/claims validation, weak keys, and replay-prone token design.
4. Require strict verification, explicit algorithms, strong keys, and appropriate claim validation.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import crypto from 'crypto';

interface AuthConfig {
  jwtSecret: string;
  algorithm: jwt.Algorithm;
  tokenExpiration: string;
  issuer: string;
  audience: string;
}

interface TokenPayload {
  userId: string;
  email: string;
  roles?: string[];
}

interface DecodedToken extends TokenPayload {
  iat: number;
  exp: number;
  iss: string;
  aud: string;
  jti: string;
}

class AuthenticationService {
  private config: AuthConfig;
  private readonly ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS: jwt.Algorithm[] = ['HS256', 'HS384', 'HS512'];
  private readonly MIN_SECRET_LENGTH = 32;
  private usedTokenIds: Set<string> = new Set();

  constructor(config?: Partial<AuthConfig>) {
    const secret = config?.jwtSecret || this.generateStrongSecret();
    const algorithm = config?.algorithm || 'HS256';

    this.validateConfiguration(secret, algorithm);

    this.config = {
      jwtSecret: secret,
      algorithm: algorithm,
      tokenExpiration: config?.tokenExpiration || '1h',
      issuer: config?.issuer || 'auth-service',
      audience: config?.audience || 'api-service'
    };
  }

  private generateStrongSecret(): string {
    return crypto.randomBytes(64).toString('hex');
  }

  private validateConfiguration(secret: string, algorithm: jwt.Algorithm): void {
    if (secret.length < this.MIN_SECRET_LENGTH) {
      throw new Error(`JWT secret must be at least ${this.MIN_SECRET_LENGTH} characters long`);
    }

    if (!this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS.includes(algorithm)) {
      throw new Error(`Algorithm '${algorithm}' is not allowed. Use one of: ${this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS.join(', ')}`);
    }

    if (algorithm === 'none' || algorithm.toLowerCase() === 'none') {
      throw new Error('Algorithm "none" is not permitted for security reasons');
    }
  }

  public signToken(payload: TokenPayload): string {
    const jti = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');
    
    const tokenPayload = {
      ...payload,
      jti
    };

    const token = jwt.sign(tokenPayload, this.config.jwtSecret, {
      algorithm: this.config.algorithm,
      expiresIn: this.config.tokenExpiration,
      issuer: this.config.issuer,
      audience: this.config.audience
    });

    return token;
  }

  public verifyToken(token: string): DecodedToken {
    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, this.config.jwtSecret, {
        algorithms: this.ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS,
        issuer: this.config.issuer,
        audience: this.config.audience,
        complete: false
      }) as DecodedToken;

      if (!decoded.exp || decoded.exp * 1000 < Date.now()) {
        throw new Error('Token has expired');
      }

      if (!decoded.jti) {
        throw new Error('Token missing unique identifier');
      }

      if (this.usedTokenIds.has(decoded.jti)) {
        throw new Error('Token has already been used (replay attack detected)');
      }

      return decoded;
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid token: ${error.message}`);
      }
      if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
        throw new Error('Token has expired');
      }
      if (error instanceof jwt.NotBeforeError) {
        throw new Error('Token not yet valid');
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  public markTokenAsUsed(jti: string): void {
    this.usedTokenIds.add(jti);
  }

  public refreshToken(oldToken: string): string {
    const decoded = this.verifyToken(oldToken);
    
    const newPayload: TokenPayload = {
      userId: decoded.userId,
      email: decoded.email,
      roles: decoded.roles
    };

    if (decoded.jti) {
      this.markTokenAsUsed(decoded.jti);
    }

    return this.signToken(newPayload);
  }

  public revokeToken(token: string): void {
    const decoded = this.verifyToken(token);
    if (decoded.jti) {
      this.markTokenAsUsed(decoded.jti);
    }
  }
}

export { AuthenticationService, AuthConfig, TokenPayload, DecodedToken };
